data.title: CMS Energy will announce 2025 year-end results on Feb 5, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. EST via webcast.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan on January 15, 2026, CMS Energy disclosed plans to release their 2025 year-end results and present a business and financial forecast at 10:00 a.m. EST on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The presentation will be broadcasted via webcast on CMS Energy's website.

data.title: Con Edison will report 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026, after market close.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) announced its intention to disclose its 2025 earnings on February 19, 2026, after the market closes. Con Edison, listed on NYSE as ED, is a holding company known for offering diverse energy products and services. This release date is eagerly awaited by investors and industry analysts for insights into the company's financial performance. Stay tuned for the detailed financial results.

data.title: MDU Resources Group to webcast its year-end 2025 earnings conference call on Feb 5 at 2 p.m. ET. Results to be released before US financial markets open.
data.description: BISMARCK, North Dakota - MDU Resources Group, Inc. is scheduled to broadcast its year-end 2025 earnings conference call on February 5th at 2 p.m. ET. Traded under NYSE as MDU, the company will disclose its year-end results prior to the opening of U.S. financial markets. The webcast for the conference call will be available for access...

data.title: Hormel Foods appoints Domenic Borrelli as EVP of Retail, joining on Feb 23, 2026._brings extensive category leadership.
data.description: In Austin, Minnesota, on January 15, 2026, Hormel Foods Corporation, a Fortune 500 branded food company trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HRL, revealed the selection of Domenic Borrelli as the new executive vice president of Retail. Borrelli is set to assume his responsibilities on February 23, 2026. In his position, he will be in charge of managing the retail sector within the company.

data.title: In 2025, Iran's crypto economy surged to $7.8B due to protests, with Bitcoin use growing amid turmoil, per Chainalysis.
data.description: In 2025, Iran experienced a surge in cryptocurrency usage as reported by a new study. This increase was fueled by both civilians and government entities resorting to Bitcoin amid times of instability.

data.title: Encore Capital Group (Nasdaq: ECPG) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 25, conference call at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
data.description: Encore Capital Group, Inc. is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 25, 2026, after market hours. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ECPG, operates as an international specialty finance firm. Following the release, a conference call and slide presentation will be held on the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific / 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. The call will feature key executives including Ashish Masih, the President and CEO, Tomas Hernanz, the EVP and CFO, and Bruce Thomas, the VP of Global Investor Relations, who will present and analyze the financial outcomes.

data.title: Big Court and Ice T launch OG Network, with 2.3 million viewing minutes. Promising start for the new streaming platform.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 15, 2026, Media Executive Courtney "Big Court" Richardson II, known as the Founder of OG Network and host of Holdin' Court Podcast on Revolt TV, has collaborated with Grammy Award-Winning Hip-Hop Icon & Actor Ice T as Co-Founder. Together, they have officially introduced OG Network.

data.title: BMV sees increase in AI clients, welcomes four new businesses as demand for earned media rises. Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: Four artificial intelligence companies have recently joined Beantown Media Ventures (BMV), a prominent public relations and content marketing agency catering to B2B technology firms. This development comes as technology brands increasingly aim to set themselves apart and boost demand through generative engines. The firms are leveraging BMV's services to enhance their visibility, with Boston serving as the focal point of these collaborations. This announcement was made on January 15, 2026, marking a significant step in the expansion of BMV’s client portfolio within the tech sector.

data.title: Crypto sanctions by OFAC target $100B+ in illicit flows through 2025, with exchanges like Garantex and Huione Group involved in $4B laundering scheme.
data.description: The Chainalysis tracker has uncovered that the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has imposed sanctions on exchanges involved in processing billions of dollars in cryptocurrency crimes. This includes Garantex and Huione Group, which was reportedly operating a $4 billion money laundering scheme.
Trump praises low oil and gas prices.

data.title: Capital Southwest announces preliminary Q3 2026 operating results with earnings release and conference call schedule.
data.description: Dallas, on Jan. 15, 2026, Capital Southwest Corporation (“Capital Southwest”) (Nasdaq: CSWC), an internally managed business development firm specializing in offering versatile financing options for middle market businesses' acquisition and expansion, released its estimated operating outcomes for Q3 of its 2026 fiscal year (ending Dec. 31, 2025). Additionally, the company disclosed details about its Q3 2026 earnings declaration and conference call timetable.

data.title: J.B. Hunt's Q4 revenue slightly below estimates at $3.097B, beats EPS at $1.90 per share. Stock trading lower.
data.description: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc (NASDAQ: JBHT) released its fourth-quarter financial results after the market closed on Thursday. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $3.097 billion, which was slightly below the estimated $3.099 billion. However, J.B. Hunt exceeded earnings expectations by reporting $1.90 per share compared to the estimated $1.77 per share. Following the report, J.B. Hunt Transport stock is trading lower. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
New Zealand Manufacturing PMI Actual 56.1 (Forecast -, Previous 51.4)

data.title: Bel Fuse Inc. appoints Tom Smelker as President of Connectivity Solutions on Jan 26, 2026. (chars: 83)
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in West Orange, New Jersey, Bel Fuse Inc. (Nasdaq: BELFA and BELFB) disclosed the naming of Tom Smelker as the President of Connectivity Solutions, beginning his role on January 26, 2026. Bel Fuse Inc. is a notable worldwide producer of items specializing in empowering, safeguarding, and linking electronic circuits.
YEMEN'S PRIME MINISTER SALEM BIN BREIK SUBMITS GOVERNMENT RESIGNATION, PRESIDENTIAL LEADERSHIP COUNCIL ACCEPTS IT -REPORTS

data.title: State Street stock at record highs as earnings come amidst economic optimism following strong results from BlackRock, BNY Mellon.
data.description: State Street has reported robust earnings following impressive results from BlackRock and Bank of New York Mellon. STT stock has surged to all-time highs. This development comes amidst positive economic sentiment, reflecting a trend of success across financial markets.

data.title: Analysts optimistic on digital gaming industry's profit growth this year. DraftKings climbs on analyst comment.
data.description: Industry analysts are optimistic about the digital gaming sector this year, anticipating significant profit growth. DraftKings saw a rise in its stock following positive analyst comments, with a new data-center venture receiving a target hike. This positive outlook suggests a prosperous period for digital gaming companies.

data.title: China's BYD beats Tesla as top EV company, eyes U.S. market under Trump's policy, possibly setting up a breakthrough.
data.description: The Chinese electric vehicle company BYD has surpassed Tesla to become the top EV manufacturer globally. With this milestone, the company is now eyeing a foray into the American car market as President Donald Trump has signaled the potential for Chinese car factories to operate in the U.S. This development brings BYD closer to entering the U.S. market, marking a significant shift in the EV industry. The news of BYD's expansion was first reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ocular Therapeutix shares fluctuate amid rumors of Sanofi considering higher bid for acquisition.
data.description: Ocular Therapeutix stocks experienced fluctuations on Thursday following reports that Sanofi may make a higher bid to acquire the company. The share prices initially surged, but later underwent a series of ups and downs due to the speculations. This event signifies the potential impact of the rumored increased offer from Sanofi on Ocular Therapeutix's market performance.

data.title: WV bill proposes allowing state treasury to invest in crypto with market cap over $750B, currently limited to Bitcoin.
data.description: The proposed law would permit the state's financial department to possess digital currencies valued at over $750 billion in the market, a restriction that currently applies solely to Bitcoin as of January.
